message:
✨ Default widget API endpoint to current site origin on Netlify

When exporting widgets from console.kubestellar.io or *.netlify.app,
the API endpoint now defaults to the current site URL so exported
widgets fetch from Netlify Functions. Local dev still defaults to
http://localhost:8080.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
